name: Centuria Office Reit
analysis: COF has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.9150, stop A$0.8662, target A$1.0076 (1.90:1) — then trail it.
